name: estimator-runner
description: Строит point estimates по estimator spec: naive и weighted proportion, weighted mean, sample quantile и weighted rate с проверкой upstream sampling audit и distribution cards.
usage: python outputs/estimator_runner.py --sample ../data/tiny/sample_observations.csv --spec outputs/estimator_spec.json --sampling-audit outputs/upstream_sampling_audit.json --distribution-cards ../02-distributions/outputs/distribution_cards.json --output-estimates point_estimates.csv --output-report estimator_report.json
